name: mcp-gemini-server
description: Marketplace for the mcp-gemini-server Claude Code plugin: the Gemini MCP server, the gemini-team skill, and the gemini-delegate subagent.

plugins.name: mcp-gemini-server
plugins.description: Gemini MCP server plugin for Claude Code: registers the 'gemini' MCP server (7 tools), the gemini-team skill, the gemini-delegate subagent, and a delegation-check hook. Requires GEMINI_API_KEY (env or ~/.gemini-mcp.json).
